assignment.name: Tiny Ledger API
assignment.author: lognd
assignment.description: A small Flask web server implementing an in-memory ledger of items behind five REST routes (GET /items, GET /items/<id>, POST /items, DELETE /items/<id>, PUT /items/<id>), built with the app factory pattern so every test gets a fresh, isolated ledger -- graded via Flask's test_client for exact status codes, exact error bodies, id sequencing, and PUT-replaces-not-merges semantics, with no real network traffic.
